changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Projectile hits Bushehr nuclear power plant — IAEA reports no damage
latest_news.text: A projectile hit the premises of Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant Tuesday night. No damage to the plant or injuries to staff reported. IAEA confirms. First direct strike on nuclear facility in this conflict — unprecedented escalation.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on Hormuz missile sites
latest_news.text: US aircraft dropped 'multiple 5,000-pound deep penetrator munitions' on hardened Iranian missile sites along Strait of Hormuz coastline. Part of effort to prevent Iran from striking commercial shipping.

latest_news.headline: 2 killed in Ramat Gan, Israel from Iranian missile barrage
latest_news.text: A man and woman died from serious shrapnel injuries in Ramat Gan near Tel Aviv following Iranian missile barrage. Search and rescue at multiple sites in central Israel.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms security chief Ali Larijani killed — son and bodyguards also dead
latest_news.text: Iran's Supreme National Security Council confirms Larijani died alongside his son (security deputy) and several protection team members in overnight Israeli strike on Tehran.

latest_news.headline: DNI Gabbard backs Trump's threat determination after NCTC Director Kent resigns
latest_news.text: DNI Tulsi Gabbard publicly backs Trump's authority to determine imminent threat after NCTC Director Joe Kent resigned over objections to war. Kent said Iran posed 'no imminent threat'.

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'not ready to leave yet' but will leave Iran 'in the near future'
latest_news.text: Trump tells Sky News US is 'not ready to leave yet' but will withdraw 'in the near future.' Contradicts earlier claims of swift operation.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 01:04 UTC) — War continues across 5 active theaters. Bushehr nuclear plant STRUCK (no damage per IAEA) — unprecedented. US deploys 5,000-lb bunker busters on Hormuz. 2 killed in Ramat Gan. Larijani confirmed dead. 1,444+ killed in Iran, 18,551 wounded. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. Oil >$100. No ceasefire signals in any theater.
